tasks.objective: In config/service.ini, change retries from 2 to 3 and change nothing else.
In requirements.txt, update widget from 1.4.1 to 1.4.2 and change nothing else.
Sort the lines in config/features.txt alphabetically, preserving one trailing newline.
Remove only the second duplicate /health line from config/routes.txt; preserve order.
Correct examples/status.txt so the command uses --json instead of --yaml.
Correct the typo in labels/operator.txt to maintenance-window.
In settings.env, change FEATURE_ENABLED from false to true without changing MODE.
In config.json, change timeout_seconds from 10 to 15 while preserving valid JSON and the name field.
In README.md, correct the documentation link target from docs/starts.md to docs/start.md.
In services.csv, change only the api service port from 8080 to 8081.
